lernziele: Digital marketing communication gained importance during the last couple of years and is key for successful business communication. This module provides background, context and understanding of key concepts of digital marketing communication. Students learn about the variety and opportunities of digital marketing communication tools and channels such as Email, Websites, SEO, Social Media Marketing and Content Marketing. In addition, the course discusses digital marketing communication strategy and planning as well as digital marketing communication management and its critical success factors. Numerous case studies and practical exercises increase engagement and application of theoretical concepts and ensure the transfer of the presented content and real-world-applications.
vorausgKenntnisse: Basic knowledge of marketing and marketing communication

kurse.lernziele:
Professional competences:

Participants can:

  • Understand key issues in the digital environment.
  • Analyze the digital consumer.
  • Create digital persona.
  • Understand the concept of digital marketing communication.
  • Evaluate the potential of different digital marketing communication tools and channels.
  • Recommend relevant digital communication tools for organizations.
  • Understand, analyze, and apply the key factors of content marketing.
  • Discuss critical success factors of digital marketing communication management.
  • Develop a digital marketing communication strategy.
  • Construct objectives.
  • Justify resources.
  • Create a digital marketing communication plan.
  • Evaluate a digital marketing communication plan.
  • Learn practical skills of digital marketing communication.
  • Apply methods and tools of digital marketing communication in practice.


Self-competences:

Participants can:

  • Draw important knowledge from a variety of information materials.
  • Recognize individual (knowledge) deficits and address them in a targeted manner.
  • Critically question their own positions regarding digital communication strategies.


Social competences:
Participants can:

  • Evaluate different situations in teams and reach a uniform assessment.
  • Express their assessment and opinion objectively without having to insist on their own point of view.
  • Recognize the value of teamwork in developing strategies and concepts.
  • Develop concepts in teams and represent joint decisions to third parties.
  • Evaluate and develop concepts and strategies individually and present them in a professional manner.
kurse.planinhalt:
Topic area I: Introduction and digital marketing communication essentials

  • Semester week 1:
    • Introduction to digital marketing communication
    • The digital marketing environment (digital people, products, payments, processes, privacy)
  • Semester week 2:
    • Digital consumer & digital consumer behavior
    • Customer experience and customer journey
    • Digital personas


Topic area II: Tools and channels of digital marketing communication & practical application with a simulation

  • Semester week 3:
    • Email, Websites, SEO, digital advertising
    • Content Marketing
  • Semester week 4:
    • Social media marketing (introduction & key concepts)
    • Social media platforms
    • Social media implementation
  • Semester week 5: 
    • Online communities
    • Mobile marketing
    • Augmented, virtual and mixed realities
  • Semester weeks 6 - 8: 
    • Practical application:
      Digital marketing simulation game — an all-in-one simulation where students will learn by doing. From SEO and social media to email marketing, students will apply real-world strategies in a risk-free, engaging environment that brings digital marketing to life through experiential learning. 


Topic area III: Digital marketing communication strategy and planning

  • Semester week 9:
    • Digital marketing communication audit
  • Semester week 10:
    • Digital marketing communication strategy
    • Digital marketing communication objectives
  • Semester week 11:
    • Building the digital marketing communication plan


Topic area IV: Digital marketing communication management

  • Semester week 12:
    • Managing resources
    • Reporting 
  • Semester week 13:

    • Metrics, Analytics & Insights

    • Integration and Transformation

    • Preparation of the executive presentation
kurse.bibliographie:
Mandatory:

  • Hanlon, A. (2025). Digital Marketing (3rd Edition). Sage Publications Ltd. (ISBN: 9781529680447)
  • Hanlon, A. (2022). The Digital Marketing Planner. Sage Publications Ltd. (ISBN: 9781529742787)
kurse.empfLehrmittel:
• Lectures
  • Work in groups and individual work
  • Self-study work
  • Digital marketing simulation game
kurse.bemerkungKurs:
Please be aware that some lectures will be online only & that the times for these lectures might differ from the regular in-class lectures in Rapperswil-Jona. So please check and note the schedule for all lectures of the semster!

 

Full attendance during all simulation sessions (SW 6-8) is required!
